item.title: 👍Abigail Potter - Washington Trucking Associations

item.title: 👍💵Ken Short - AWB
item.description: Ken Short signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent AWB. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎Stephen Alldridge - AWB
item.description: Stephen Alldridge signed up to testify Con.

item.title: ❓Mark McKechnie - Washington Traffic Safety Commission
item.description: Mark McKechnie signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington Traffic Safety Commission.
